description: Explicit emitter overrides for ambiguous symbols. Each entry MUST have a non-empty rationale.

ambiguousSymbolOverrides.rationale: TypeScript is authoritative for the public shape and declares a readonly runtime interface extending ReportBody, with toJSON and a global constructor. Treating the stale Web IDL dictionary shape as a JSON value would misclassify browser-owned report objects.

TypeScript is authoritative for the public shape and declares a readonly runtime interface with body, type, url, toJSON, and a global constructor. The Web IDL dictionary classification would incorrectly project browser-owned Report instances as JSON records.

TypeScript is authoritative for the public shape and declares a runtime interface with toJSON and a global constructor. The Web IDL dictionary classification has no members and would erase the live object contract used by Report and its specialized body interfaces.
